issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! cards on field), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! specifically). HasRestingDon checks only resting DON!!, not total DON!! on field.
Target should specify 'ChooseUpTo' with count:2 to enforce the 'up to 2' limitation. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' does not restrict selection count.
